title: Middle Eastern Egg Tagine
description: A flavorful and spicy Middle Eastern-inspired egg dish made with a rich tagine sauce. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together. Set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the crushed eastern spices (cumin, coriander) and cook for 1 minute.
Add the crushed red pepper and cook for another minute.
Pour in the tagine spice mix and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the whisked eggs to the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently scramble the eggs and cook until they are cooked through.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cooked egg yolks.
Serve the eggs hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
